items.title: Madrid members voting in first elections for 20yrs...
items.summary: Real Madrid members voted in the club's first presidential elections in 20 years, choosing between incumbent Florentino Pérez and businessman Enrique Riquelme.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 3-year win streak ends for pole vaulter Duplantis
items.summary: Swedish pole vault star Armand "Mondo" Duplantis failed to win for the first time in 40 meets since 2023 at his home Diamond League event in Stockholm on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Watch: Today at the Test, day four highlights
items.summary: Day 4 highlights from the Test match between England and New Zealand.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
